name: Mojtaba Khamenei
summary: Day 60-61 of operational silence. **TIME APRIL 21 ARTICLE FORMALLY CONFIRMED IN MAINSTREAM WESTERN MEDIA: 'THE REGIME HAS EVEN USED AI-GENERATED VIDEOS TO SHOW KHAMENEI DELIVERING MESSAGES, FUELING SPECULATION THAT THE NEW SUPREME LEADER IS INCAPACITATED OR ABROAD.'** Iranian state attribution of statements to Mojtaba relies on synthesized media — first mainstream Western confirmation. CNN sources report a fractured foot, bruised eye, and minor lacerations from the February 28 strike. **The supreme-leader vacuum is the structural reason the IRGC and civilian government are operating on different tracks** (Tasnim hardline vs Araghchi/Pezeshkian conciliatory) — there is no unified executive resolving the factional split. The MOU's chance of signature depends partly on whether Mojtaba (or his proxy) issues a clear endorsement; without it, Iran's response to the 48-hour window is structurally constrained (Sadjadpour: 'this Iranian regime, whose senior leadership has been decapitated, going to be able to come to a quick decision on such a monumental set of issues' = 48hr inadequate). Iran International (diaspora) confirms regime use of AI media; Iranian state has not denied the AI claims explicitly. Per intel.md A7: trigger watching at Day 60-61.
